title: Meeting Again After Years
content: During a school reunion, Liam almost skipped the event because he expected to recognize very few people. As he entered the hall, however, he immediately saw Hannah talking with former classmates. They had been close friends as teenagers but had not spoken in almost twelve years. Their conversation resumed as naturally as if only a few days had passed. They shared stories about careers, families, and dreams they had finally achieved. Before leaving, Hannah suggested meeting again without waiting for another reunion. Liam happily agreed, realizing that some friendships only need a single meeting to become something much deeper.
